channel.title: Warren Buffett — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED OXY (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added OXY in Q4 2025 · 5.4% of portfolio. Continuing to build the Occidental stake.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED CB (+8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added CB in Q4 2025 · 3.1% of portfolio. Adding to insurance — home turf for Berkshire.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED DPZ (+18%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added DPZ in Q4 2025 · 0.4% of portfolio. Added to the surprise Domino's position.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED BAC (-7%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed BAC in Q4 2025 · 10.4% of portfolio. Still a top-5 position despite the trim.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED AAPL (-3%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed AAPL in Q4 2025 · 21.8% of portfolio. Small continued trim. Stabilizing.

item.title: Warren Buffett: NEW POSITION FND · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) new position FND in Q4 2025 · 0.8% of portfolio. New Floor & Decor position — retail bet.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED CVX (+7%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added CVX (CHEVRON CORP NEW) in Q4 2025 · 7.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: NEW POSITION LLYVK (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) new position LLYVK (LIBERTY LIVE HOLDINGS INC) in Q4 2025 · 0.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED AON (-12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed AON (AON PLC) in Q4 2025 · 0.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED POOL (-11%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed POOL (POOL CORP) in Q4 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED AMZN (-77%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed AMZN (AMAZON COM INC) in Q4 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED LSXMA (-84%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed LSXMA (LIBERTY MEDIA CORP DEL) in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: NEW POSITION NYT (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) new position NYT (NEW YORK TIMES CO) in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED BATRA (-48%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed BATRA (ATLANTA BRAVES HLDGS INC) in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED LILAK (-6%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed LILAK (LIBERTY LATIN AMERICA LTD) in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED OXY (+8%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added OXY in Q3 2025 · 4.8% of portfolio. Building the Occidental stake.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED BAC (-25%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed BAC in Q3 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. The aggressive BAC trim that made headlines.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED AAPL (-5%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed AAPL in Q3 2025 · 22.4% of portfolio. Small Apple trim.

item.title: Warren Buffett: EXITED SIRI · Q3 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) exited SIRI in Q3 2025. Closed Sirius XM fully.

item.title: Warren Buffett: NEW POSITION DPZ · Q3 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) new position DPZ in Q3 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio. New Domino's Pizza position — surprise entry.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED CB (+16%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added CB (CHUBB LIMITED) in Q3 2025 · 3.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: NEW POSITION GOOGL (+100%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) new position GOOGL (ALPHABET INC) in Q3 2025 · 1.6% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED VRSN (-32%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed VRSN (VERISIGN INC) in Q3 2025 · 0.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED OXY (+5%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added OXY in Q2 2025 · 4.5% of portfolio. Q2 add to Occidental — the first of three consecutive quarters.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED BAC (-18%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed BAC in Q2 2025 · 12.4% of portfolio. First wave of the big BAC trim.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED CVX (-6%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed CVX in Q2 2025 · 6.9% of portfolio. Partial Chevron reduction.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED AAPL (-7%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed AAPL (APPLE INC) in Q2 2025 · 22.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED STZ (+12%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added STZ (CONSTELLATION BRANDS INC) in Q2 2025 · 0.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: NEW POSITION UNH (+100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) new position UNH (UNITEDHEALTH GROUP INC) in Q2 2025 · 0.6% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED POOL (+136%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added POOL (POOL CORP) in Q2 2025 · 0.4% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED LEN (+4639%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added LEN (LENNAR CORP) in Q2 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: NEW POSITION NUCOR (+100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) new position NUCOR (NUCOR CORP) in Q2 2025 · 0.3% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED CHTR (-47%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed CHTR (CHARTER COMMUNICATIONS INC N) in Q2 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED HEI (+11%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added HEI (HEICO CORP NEW) in Q2 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: NEW POSITION LAMR (+100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) new position LAMR (LAMAR ADVERTISING CO NEW) in Q2 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: NEW POSITION ALLE (+100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) new position ALLE (ALLEGION PLC) in Q2 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED OXY (+4%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added OXY in Q1 2025 · 4.3% of portfolio. Early OXY build.

item.title: Warren Buffett: NEW POSITION CB · Q1 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) new position CB in Q1 2025 · 2.1% of portfolio. New Chubb position — surprise quarter entry.

item.title: Warren Buffett: EXITED HPQ · Q1 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) exited HPQ in Q1 2025. Closed HP fully.

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED BAC (-7%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed BAC (BANK AMER CORP) in Q1 2025 · 10.2% of portfolio.
